candidates.why: Exact total current assets line on the balance sheet.
Not total current assets; only a component/classification.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current balancing line, not current assets.
Wrong category; not current assets.

candidates.row_label: and equipment and other non-current assets
candidates.why: Cash flow fragment, unrelated to balance-sheet current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label; preferred over cash flow ending balance.
Could represent cash, but less standard and less clearly the total cash and cash equivalents than the explicit line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow ending balance can reconcile to balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet label is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the explicit balance-sheet cash line as primary. Included 'Cash in Hand & with Banks' as secondary because labels may vary across years.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line on the balance sheet.
Cash flow working-capital change line, not the balance-sheet stock variable.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Non-current balancing line, not current liabilities.
Wrong category; not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt; unique non-lease short-term debt component on balance sheet.
Cash flow financing movement, not the balance-sheet debt stock.
Cash flow financing movement, not the balance-sheet debt stock.
Cash flow movement and non-current, not STD stock.
Cash flow movement, not STD stock.

Likely the current borrowings/short-term financial liabilities line in current liabilities, but the same exact label also appears for non-current liabilities, creating ambiguity if selected by label alone.

variables.notes: R:c. There is also a current 'Financial liabilities' row that may include additional short-term debt beyond current maturities, but the exact label is duplicated for both current and non-current sections, so it is ambiguous in a label-only mapping. Chose the unique explicit current-maturities debt line; manual review recommended to assess whether current 'Financial liabilities' should also be included instead.

candidates.why: Exact taxes payable/current tax liability line on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit taxes payable line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet PPE line; best match for total/net PPE.
Only a component of tangible assets, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr/Imp Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation item, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Lease-related component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Gross lease-related component, not preferred PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Other Tangible Fixed Assets, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/component line, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, less clean than the reported PPE line.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total/net PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Cash flow from investing activities
candidates.why: This row carries the net cash flow from operating activities values before the next section header text begins; better match to total operating cash flow than the 'before financial items and taxes' subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Net cash from operating activities before financial items and taxes
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before financial items and taxes, not the final net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Cash flow from investing activities

variables.notes: Preferred the row representing total/net cash flow from operating activities rather than the subtotal before financial items and taxes.
